notes: Active monthly production and operations updates. RSS confirmed live. 526 BTC mined in November 2025. Reporting cadence unchanged as of December 2025.
Monthly operational updates Jan 2021 through Sep 2025. After Sep 2025 shifted to quarterly Business Update format (Q3 2025 = Oct 2025, Q4 2025 = Feb 2026).
Monthly production reports confirmed through Nov 2025 (290 BTC). Distributed via Newsfile Corp RSS. Fiscal year ends March 31.
Monthly operating updates through Aug 2025. Officially announced discontinuation Oct 2025 in press release stating transition to standardized quarterly reporting.
Monthly production and operations updates through December 2024. Switched to quarterly reporting Jan 2025. Company pivoted to HPC/AI data center infrastructure.

Monthly production updates. Gap during bankruptcy (Chapter 11 Dec 2022 - Jan 2024). Resumed monthly reporting Jan 2025. Last monthly report March 2025 (published Apr 7, 2025). Switched to quarterly after.

Monthly operations updates. Template confirmed for Jan-Mar 2025. March 2025 final monthly update (published Apr 4, 2025) explicitly announced switch to quarterly. Mining transferred to ABTC subsidiary from April 2025.

Monthly operational updates continuing via accessnewswire.com despite severe financial distress. LSE delisted December 11, 2025. Nasdaq delisting proceedings began July 2025. Very low volume (40-130 BTC/month in 2025).
Monthly production reports through approximately mid-2024. Merger with Bitfarms closed March 14, 2025. Capacity now included in BITF monthly reports.
